g.text: Perform important upgrade steps of the CI environment. And create a PR
Branch to work on and make PR against (e.g., 'main' or 'vX-Y-test')
Automatically create a PR with the upgrade changes (if not specified, will
Automatically switch to the base branch if not already on it (if not
Path to airflow-site checkout for publishing K8s schemas
Force syncing K8s schemas to airflow-site even if all versions appear
The token used to authenticate to GitHub.
Run prek autoupdate to update hook revisions
Run pin-versions to pin CI dependency versions
Run update-chart-dependencies to update Helm chart
Run upgrade-important-versions to bump key dependency
Run update-uv-lock to regenerate uv.lock with latest
Sync K8s JSON schemas to airflow-site
Print verbose information about performed steps.
If dry-run is set, commands are only printed, not executed.
